member.name: M:ThunderKit.Common.Configuration.ScriptingSymbolManager.AddScriptingDefine(System.String)
member.summary: Add a define to the scripting define symbols for every build target.

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Common.Configuration.ScriptingSymbolManager.RemoveScriptingDefine(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a define from the scripting define symbols for every build target.

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Installer.InstallThunderKit.AddScriptingDefine(System.String)
member.summary: Add a define to the scripting define symbols for every build target.

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Installer.InstallThunderKit.RemoveScriptingDefine(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a define from the scripting define symbols for every build target.
